series_metadata.series_description: This record series consists of recorded video from our highway cameras given the uptime and availability of the field devices and the communication network. ODOT will use the video for the purposes of training, operational analysis and studies. The video is saved for three consecutive days on a moving three day period. For example, on the fourth day, day one is overwritten.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: Video each camera will be saved three (3) days
